title: Odds Against Tomorrow
writer: William P. McGivern, Abraham Polonsky, Nelson Gidding
actors: Harry Belafonte, Robert Ryan, Gloria Grahame
plot: In need of quick money, a fallen former cop recruits a hard-bitten ex-con and a debt-ridden nightclub singer to pull off a bank job. But as the animosity between them boils over, the entire plan threatens to implode.
